channel.title: Population Genetics on Gillian Chu
channel.description: Recent content in Population Genetics on Gillian Chu

item.title: ASCEND
item.description:
ASCEND: Inferring the History of Founder Events in Human Populations

In progress research project. Helped out with an FFT-based calculation of linkage disequilibrium with the goal of detecting ancient founder events. Worked with Priya Moorjani and Remi Tournebize. Currently on bioarxiv, and can be found here!

[2020 March] ASCEND: Inferring the History of Founder Events in Human Populations (Remi Tournebize, Gillian Chu, Priya Moorjani)
